title: January 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 28''' is the 28th day of the year. There are 337 days remaining (338 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Andrew Jack]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Rachel Butera]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Jason Aaron]] is born.
*[[1975]] – ''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'' is completed.
*[[1981]] – [[Elijah Wood]] is born.
*[[1988]] – [[Pierce Brown]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[Ariel Winter]] is born. 
*1998 – [[Crimson Empire 2|''Crimson Empire'' 2]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Republic 60|''Republic'' 60]] published.
*2004 – [[Empire 16|''Empire'' 16]] published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 2|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 2]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Legacy (2006) 32|''Legacy'' (2006) 32]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Holocron Hunters]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Crisis on Coruscant]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: Dooku's Secret Army]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Stand Aside - Bounty Hunters!]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Overlords]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Maul: Lockdown]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 1|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 1]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2016]] – [[Paul Kantner]] dies.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Original Trilogy — The Movie Adaptations]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures Omnibus, Volume 1]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jango Fett – Trail of Lost Hope]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire (trade paperback)]]'' published.
<noinclude>
